description_long: This house features a two-story main section with a steep gabled roof and a prominent front-facing dormer, painted in teal with white trim. The facade includes a central entry door with a small overhang, flanked by rectangular windows and topped by a circular window above. The right side of the house extends into a single-story wing, also with a gabled roof, and multiple windows. The roof is dark gray with visible shingles, and a white chimney rises from the main roof. The exterior is clad in horizontal siding, and the foundation is rendered in a contrasting beige color. The overall design is compact, with symmetrical window placement and a modest, inviting entryway.
description: A teal, two-story house with a steep gabled roof, white trim, and symmetrical windows, featuring a central entry door and a prominent dormer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two tall windows above, a circular attic window, and the right-side single-story extension.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gabled roof, chimney, and the narrow profile of the house with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows on the main section and the single-story extension, with no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gabled roof and the plain siding, with no windows or doors visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with a circular attic window
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a small overhang, rectangular transom, and white trim
